name: Prawns with Lobster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell, devein and rinse the prawns. Slice them in half lengthwise (butterfly them).
2. Mash the fermented black beans with garlic, ginger, and sugar. Set aside.
3. Add 3 tablespoons of oil to a wok. Cook the pork for 2 minutes until no longer pink.
4. Add the fermented black bean mixture. Add the prawns and cook for half a minute on high heat.
5. If you like, add a pinch of hot bean paste (optional).
6. Add oyster sauce, salt, and water. Bring to a boil, cover the wok, and cook for one minute.
7. Stir in one raw egg, then add scallions. Mix a little cornstarch with water.
8. Add to the wok. Stir until it thickens somewhat.
